mapper.insert: insert into xhbs_api_log ( request_id, request_uri, http_method, client_ip, user_id, request_params, response_body, response_code, cost_time, user_agent, created_at ) values ( #{requestId}, #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{clientIp}, #{userId}, #{requestParams}, #{responseBody}, #{responseCode}, #{costTime}, #{userAgent}, now() )
